# extendedTextInputTraits

**Instance Property**

Object from which the BEExtendedTextInputTraits will be gathered.

## Declaration

```swift
var extendedTextInputTraits: (any BEExtendedTextInputTraits)? { get }
```

## Input traits

- **textStyling(at:in:)**: Returns a dictionary containing NSAttributedString keys represeting appearance customizations.

items.description: Returns a dictionary containing NSAttributedString keys represeting appearance customizations.
items.name: textStyling(at:in:)
